---
title: '2014/04/05 Journal Sat Bless. Curse. WF. Hope as a tool or weapon?'
date: '2014-04-05T13:06:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3139042066476351079'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/20140405-journal-sat-bless-curse-wf.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<h4>
VOD:</h4>
COME:<br />
<br />
<h3 class="hd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; -webkit-box-shadow: rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px 1px 0px 0px inset; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: #dddcda; background-image: linear-gradient(rgb(238, 237, 235), rgb(221, 220, 218)); background-size: 100%; border-bottom-color: rgb(203, 201, 207); border-bottom-style: solid; border-top-left-radius: 4px; border-top-right-radius: 4px; border-width: 0px 0px 1px; box-shadow: rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px 1px 0px 0px inset; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 24px; margin: 0px; padding: 5px 15px; position: relative;">
<a href="https://www.bible.com/users/darrellwolfe/reading-plans/28-joseph-prince?initial=true&amp;user_id=darrellwolfe" target="_blank">Devotional</a></h3>
<div class="bd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-color: #eeedeb; background-image: url(https://web-production.s3.amazonaws.com/assets/shadow-4d512a7dd93d0b3310411703391b99c1.png); background-repeat: repeat no-repeat; border: 0px; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 21.600000381469727px; margin: 0px; padding: 20px;">
<div style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
Day 144</div>
<div style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
Jesus Wore The Crown Of Thorns For You</div>
<div style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
John 19:2</div>
<div style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
2And the soldiers twisted a crown of thorns and put it on His head…</div>
<div style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
If hard work is the formula for prosperity, then everyone who works hard should be prosperous. But this is certainly not the case. Many people who work very hard are still in lack!</div>
<div style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
I am not advocating laziness. What I am saying is that working hard by the sweat of your brow is not how God’s provision comes. In fact, if you have to work overtime all the time and are stressed out, you are probably operating under the curse.</div>
<div style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
***</div>
<div style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
Beloved, every curse that was supposed to fall on your head fell on Jesus’ head, typified by the crown of thorns. He wore the crown of thorns for you so that you can have peace of mind. He wore the crown of thorns for you and took your curse so that you can wear the crown of glory and take His righteousness, and all the benefits of that righteousness!</div>
<div style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0px;">
Today,<b> don’t labor </b>and toil like the people of the world. Instead, <b>expect</b> to see the blessings of God come into your life without blood, sweat and tears because Jesus wore the crown of thorns for you!</div>
</div>
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 2em; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 1em;">
<br /><blockquote>
<a href="https://www.bible.com/bible/1/deu.8.kjv" target="_blank">Deut 8</a><span class="verse v1" data-usfm="DEU.8.1" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">1</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">All the commandments which I command thee this day shall ye <b>observe to do,</b> that ye may <b>live</b>, and <b>multiply</b>, and <b>go in and possess </b>the land which the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;sware unto your fathers.</span></span><span class="verse v2" data-usfm="DEU.8.2" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">2</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">And thou shalt remember all the way which the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;thy God<b> led thee these forty years in the wilderness, to humble thee, and to prove thee, to know what was in thine heart, whether thou wouldest keep his commandments, or no.</b></span></span><span class="verse v3" data-usfm="DEU.8.3" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">3</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">And he <b>humbled thee, and suffered thee to hunger, and fed thee with manna,</b> which thou knewest not, neither did thy fathers know; that he might make thee know that<b> man doth not live by bread only, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of the&nbsp;</b></span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>Lord</b></span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>&nbsp;doth man live.</b></span></span><span class="verse v4" data-usfm="DEU.8.4" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">4</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Thy raiment waxed not old upon thee, neither did thy foot swell, these forty years.</span></span><span class="verse v5" data-usfm="DEU.8.5" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">5</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Thou shalt also consider in thine heart, that, as a man chasteneth his son, so the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;thy God chasteneth thee.</span></span><span class="verse v6" data-usfm="DEU.8.6" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">6</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Therefore thou shalt keep the commandments of the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">thy God, to walk in his ways, and to fear him.</span></span><span class="verse v7" data-usfm="DEU.8.7" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">7</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">For the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;thy God bringeth thee into a good land, a land of brooks of water, of fountains and depths that spring out of valleys and hills;</span></span><span class="verse v8" data-usfm="DEU.8.8" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">8</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">A land of wheat, and barley, and vines, and fig trees, and pomegranates; a land of oil olive, and honey;</span></span><span class="verse v9" data-usfm="DEU.8.9" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">9</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">A land wherein thou shalt eat bread without scarceness, thou shalt not lack any thing in it; a land whose stones are iron, and out of whose hills thou mayest dig brass.</span></span><span class="verse v10" data-usfm="DEU.8.10" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">10</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">When thou hast eaten and art full, then thou shalt bless the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;thy God for the good land which he hath given thee.</span></span><span class="verse v11" data-usfm="DEU.8.11" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">11</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Beware that thou forget not the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;thy God, in not keeping his commandments, and his judgments, and his statutes, which I command thee this day:</span></span><span class="verse v12" data-usfm="DEU.8.12" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">12</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lest when thou hast eaten and art full, and hast built goodly houses, and dwelt therein;</span></span><span class="verse v13" data-usfm="DEU.8.13" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">13</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">And when thy herds and thy flocks multiply, and thy silver and thy gold is multiplied, and all that thou hast is multiplied;</span></span><span class="verse v14" data-usfm="DEU.8.14" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">14</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Then thine heart be lifted up, and thou forget the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">thy God, which brought thee forth out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage;</span></span><span class="verse v15" data-usfm="DEU.8.15" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">15</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Who led thee through that great and terrible wilderness, wherein were fiery serpents, and scorpions, and drought, where there was no water; who brought thee forth water out of the rock of flint;</span></span><span class="verse v16" data-usfm="DEU.8.16" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">16</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Who fed thee in the wilderness with manna, which thy fathers knew not, that he might humble thee, and that he might prove thee, to do thee good at thy latter end;</span></span><span class="verse v17" data-usfm="DEU.8.17" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">17</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">And thou say in thine heart, My power and the might of mine hand hath gotten me this wealth.</span></span><span class="verse v18" data-usfm="DEU.8.18" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">18</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">But thou shalt remember the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;thy God: for it is he that giveth thee power to get wealth, that he may establish his covenant which he sware unto thy fathers, as it is this day.</span></span><span class="verse v19" data-usfm="DEU.8.19" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">19</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">And it shall be, if thou do at all forget the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;thy God, and walk after other gods, and serve them, and worship them, I testify against you this day that ye shall surely perish.</span></span><span class="verse v20" data-usfm="DEU.8.20" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">20</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">As the nations which the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;destroyeth before your face, so shall ye perish; because ye would not be obedient unto the voice of the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;your God.</span></span></blockquote>
</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #9d3300; font-family: arial; font-size: 24px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; width: 525px;">
<br /><blockquote>
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/hebrews/passage.aspx?q=hebrews+6:9-20" style="font-weight: normal;" target="_blank">Hebrews 6:9-20 (King James Version)</a><br /><span class="versetext" id="heb6-9" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">9</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1161">But,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="27">beloved,</span>&nbsp;we are&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3982">persuaded</span>&nbsp;better&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2909">things</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4012">of</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="5216">you,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2532">and</span>&nbsp;things that&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2192">accompany</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4991">salvation,</span><span class="strongs" sn="1499">though</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2980">we</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3779">thus</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2980">speak</span>&nbsp;.&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-10" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">10</span><b>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1063">For</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2316">God</span>&nbsp;is&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3756">not</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="94">unrighteous</span>&nbsp;to&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1950">forget</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="5216">your</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2041">work</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2532">and</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2873">labour</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;</b><span class="strongs" sn="26"><b>love</b>,</span><span class="strongs" sn="3739" style="font-weight: normal;">which</span>&nbsp;ye have&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1731" style="font-weight: normal;">shewed</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1519" style="font-weight: normal;">toward</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="846" style="font-weight: normal;">his</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3686" style="font-weight: normal;">name,</span>&nbsp;in that ye have&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1247" style="font-weight: normal;">ministered</span>&nbsp;to the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="40" style="font-weight: normal;">saints,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2532" style="font-weight: normal;">and</span>&nbsp;do&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1247" style="font-weight: normal;">minister</span>&nbsp;.</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-11" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">11</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1161">And</span>&nbsp;we&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1937">desire</span>&nbsp;that every&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1538">one</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="5216">you</span>&nbsp;do&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1731">shew</span>&nbsp;the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="846">same</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4710">diligence</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4314">to</span>&nbsp;the </span><span class="versetext" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>full&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4136">assurance</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1680">hope&nbsp;</span><span class="strongs" sn="891">unto</span>&nbsp;the&nbsp;</b><span class="strongs" sn="5056"><b>end</b>:</span>&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-12" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">12</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3363">That</span>&nbsp;ye&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1096">be</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3363">not</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3576">slothful,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1161">but</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3402">followers</span>&nbsp;of them who&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1223">through</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4102">faith</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2532">and</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3115">patience&nbsp;</span><span class="strongs" sn="2816">inherit</span>&nbsp;the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1860">promises.</span>&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-13" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">13</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1063">For</span>&nbsp;when&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2316">God</span>&nbsp;made&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1861">promise</span>&nbsp;to&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="11">Abraham,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1893">because</span>&nbsp;he&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2192">could</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3660">swear</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2596">by</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3762">no&nbsp;</span><span class="strongs" sn="3187">greater,</span>&nbsp;he&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3660">sware</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2596">by</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1438">himself,</span>&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-14" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">14</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3004">Saying</span>&nbsp;,&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3375">Surely</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2229"></span><span class="strongs" sn="2127">blessing</span>&nbsp;I will&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2127">bless</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4571">thee,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2532">and</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4129">multiplying</span>&nbsp;I will&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4129">multiply</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4571">thee.</span>&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-15" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">15</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2532">And</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3779">so,</span>&nbsp;after he had patiently&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3114">endured</span>&nbsp;, he&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2013">obtained</span>&nbsp;the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1860">promise.</span>&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-16" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">16</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1063">For</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="444">me n</span><span class="strongs" sn="3303">verily</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3660">swear</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2596">by</span>&nbsp;the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3187">greater:</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2532">and</span>&nbsp;an&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3727">oath</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1519">for</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="951">confirmation</span>&nbsp;is to&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="846">them</span>&nbsp;an&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4009">end</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3956">all</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="485">strife.</span>&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-17" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">17</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3739">Wherein&nbsp;</span><span class="strongs" sn="1722"></span><span class="strongs" sn="2316">God,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1014">willing</span>&nbsp;more&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4054">abundantly</span>&nbsp;to&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1925">shew</span>&nbsp;unto the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2818">heirs</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1860">promise</span>&nbsp;the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="276">immutability</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="846">his</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1012">counsel,</span><span class="strongs" sn="3315">confirmed</span>&nbsp;it by<a href="https://draft.blogger.com/null" name="a"></a>&nbsp;an&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3727">oath:</span>&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-18" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">18</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2443">That</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1223">by</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1417">two</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="276">immutable</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4229">things,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1722">in</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3739">which</span>&nbsp;it was&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="102">impossible</span>&nbsp;for&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2316">God</span>&nbsp;to&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="5574">lie</span>&nbsp;, </span><span class="versetext" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>we might&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2192">have</span>&nbsp;a&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2478">strong</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3874">consolation,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3588">who</span>&nbsp;have fled for&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2703">refuge</span>&nbsp;to lay&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2902">hold</span>&nbsp;upon the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1680">hope</span>&nbsp;set before&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4295">us</span>&nbsp;</b></span><span class="versetext" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">:&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-19" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">19</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3739">Which</span>&nbsp;hope we&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2192">have</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="5613">as</span>&nbsp;an&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="45">anchor</span>&nbsp;of the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="5590">soul,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="5037">both</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="804">sure</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2532">and</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="949">stedfast,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2532">and</span>&nbsp;which&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1525">entereth&nbsp;</span><span class="strongs" sn="1519">into</span>&nbsp;that&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2082">within</span>&nbsp;the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2665">veil;</span>&nbsp;</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></span><span class="versetext" id="heb6-20" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; display: inline; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="versenum" style="font-weight: bold; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">20</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3699">Whither</span>&nbsp;the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4274">forerunner</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1525">is</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="5228">for</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2257">us</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1525">entered</span>&nbsp;, even&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2424">Jesus,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1096">made</span>&nbsp;an high&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="749">priest</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1519">for</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="165">ever</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2596">after</span>&nbsp;the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="5010">order</span>&nbsp;of&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3198">Melchisedec.</span></span></blockquote>
</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/romans/12-14.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Romans 12:14 KJV</a><blockquote>
<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">Bless</span>&nbsp;them which persecute you:&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;, and curse not.</blockquote>
</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/luke/6-28.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Luke 6:28 KJV</a><blockquote>
<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">Bless</span>&nbsp;them that curse you, and pray for them which despitefully use you.</blockquote>
</blockquote>
Recap<br />
<br />
Deut 8:3<br />
<span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 34px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 17px;"><b>...man doth not live by bread only, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of the&nbsp;</b></span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; line-height: 34px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 17px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><b>Lord</b></span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 34px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 17px;"><b>&nbsp;doth man live.</b></span><br />
Deut 8:1<br />
<span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 17px;">1</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 34px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 17px;">All the commandments which I command thee this day shall ye&nbsp;<b>observe to do,</b>&nbsp;that ye may&nbsp;<b>live</b>, and&nbsp;<b>multiply</b>, and&nbsp;<b>go in and possess&nbsp;</b>the land which the&nbsp;</span><span class="nd" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-variant: small-caps; line-height: 34px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 17px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Lord</span></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; background-color: white; border: 0px; color: #444444; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 34px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; text-indent: 17px;">&nbsp;sware unto your fathers.</span><br />
<br />
Heb 6:18<br />
<b style="color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14.44444465637207px; line-height: 20px;">"...we might&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2192">have</span>&nbsp;a&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2478">strong</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3874">consolation,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3588">who</span>&nbsp;have fled for&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2703">refuge</span>&nbsp;to lay&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2902">hold</span>&nbsp;upon the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1680">hope</span>&nbsp;set before&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4295">us</span>&nbsp;..."</b><br />
<br />
JP:&nbsp;<span style="background-color: #eeedeb; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12.222222328186035px; line-height: 21.600000381469727px;">Today,</span><b style="background-color: #eeedeb; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12.222222328186035px; line-height: 21.600000381469727px;">&nbsp;don’t labor&nbsp;</b><span style="background-color: #eeedeb; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12.222222328186035px; line-height: 21.600000381469727px;">and toil like the people of the world. Instead,&nbsp;</span><b style="background-color: #eeedeb; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12.222222328186035px; line-height: 21.600000381469727px;">expect</b><span style="background-color: #eeedeb; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12.222222328186035px; line-height: 21.600000381469727px;">&nbsp;to see the blessings of God come into your life without blood, sweat and tears because Jesus wore the crown of thorns for you!</span><br />
<span style="background-color: #eeedeb; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12.222222328186035px; line-height: 21.600000381469727px;"><br /></span>
<span style="background-color: #eeedeb; color: #333333; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, 'Liberation Sans', FreeSans, sans-serif; font-size: 12.222222328186035px; line-height: 21.600000381469727px;">I am not advocating laziness. What I am saying is that working hard by the sweat of your brow is not how God’s provision comes. In fact, if you have to work overtime all the time and are stressed out, you are probably operating under the curse.</span><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
HERE:<br />
<br />
I'm not sure what I'm hearing.... but it's something like this.<br />
<br />
The curse is to labor with sweat, worry, anxiety, and frustration. Much work little reward. I've worked OT for months and months never catching up. Lately things in my house have been breaking, cars, pipes, fence posts.... I'm cursing at work before and after calls. I'm miserable to the point of death, literally. My health is diminished and I wish I was dead more often now.... or could escape. Escape the bills, and demands, and the "More Bricks Less Straw" environment at WF.<br />
<br />
So I could try to stop cursing at work. I could bless and not curse. Try "Blessing" them every time a crap referral comes into my line, and being a blessing to the customer by being fully engaged. Maybe, even though they were tricked or lied to in order to get to me, I can still be a blessing to them.<br />
<br />
But the fact I'm even there still feels like the curse. Somewhere along the way this job went from blessing to curse like it did for the Israelites in Egypt. And like Israel, I've been out here in Texas saying: "God has brought me here to die! He should have left me in California..."<br />
<br />
Heb 6:18<br />
<b style="color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14.44444465637207px; line-height: 20px;">"...we might&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2192">have</span>&nbsp;a&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2478">strong</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3874">consolation,</span>&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="3588">who</span>&nbsp;have fled for&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2703">refuge</span>&nbsp;to lay&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="2902">hold</span>&nbsp;upon the&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="1680">hope</span>&nbsp;set before&nbsp;<span class="strongs" sn="4295">us</span>&nbsp;..."</b><br />
<br />
<br />
So I should use HOPE : EXPECTATION as a tool or weapon against this doubt, fear, unbelief????<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
DO:<br />
<br />
I'm not exactly sure what to do. Or maybe, more accurately, practically how to do it... how do I do "Hope" on purpose?<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Thankful:</h4>
<br />
I'm thankful for Preston. Who is a great little kid this morning.<br />
<br />
<h4>
Feeling:</h4>
Fear... Every call is cumbersome, awkward and painful at WF now... It's getting harder. I know it's in my mind, but I'm actually working AGAINST WF. I'm working against them in how they do their business, the very philosophies they operate under, every caller has been mistreated and I feel I have to fix it, then I'm supposed to sell them products I don't believe will be great for them. When I do open something I feel worse.<br />
<br />
I'd like to feel "hope"... but what Hope? Hope for what? What am I expecting?<br />
<br />
Right now I'm expecting to have another difficult day where I muscle through and try not to yell at anyone...<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<b>This here might be the answer to my attitude at work:</b><br />
<br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/romans/12-14.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Romans 12:14 KJV</a><blockquote>
<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">Bless</span>&nbsp;them which persecute you:&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;, and curse not.</blockquote>
</blockquote>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/luke/6-28.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Luke 6:28 KJV</a><blockquote>
<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">Bless</span>&nbsp;them that curse you, and pray for them which despitefully use you.</blockquote>
</blockquote>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
<br />
Fence is fixed. Front Garden is dug out, still have to do the trees. I should have left my office 15 minutes ago at least.<br />
<br />
Peace! DW<br />
<br />
<h4>
Bless in the NT</h4>
<br />
<div class="SortBy" id="VerseResultsSortBy" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 12px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 0px 15px;">
Sort results by:&nbsp;<a class="Inactive" disabled="disabled" href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=bless&amp;t=kjv&amp;s=Bibles&amp;c=nt&amp;ps=10&amp;sort=book" id="SortByBook" style="color: #336699; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none;">Book of the Bible&nbsp;</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=bless&amp;t=kjv&amp;s=Bibles&amp;c=nt&amp;ps=10&amp;sort=relevance" id="SortByRelevance" style="color: #336699; font-weight: bold;">Most relevant search result</a></div>
<div class="ResultList" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 12px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<ul id="Page-1" style="list-style: none; margin: 10px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 15px; padding: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/matthew/5-44.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Matthew 5:44 KJV</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
But I say unto you, Love your enemies,&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;them that curse you, do good to them that hate you, and pray for them which despitefully use you, and persecute you;</div>

</li>

<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 15px; padding: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/acts/3-26.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Acts 3:26 KJV</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
Unto you first God, having raised up his Son Jesus, sent him to&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;you, in turning away every one of you from his iniquities.</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/acts/3.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read Acts 3</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=Acts+3:26" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/acts/3-26-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=Acts+3:26" id="" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Interlinear view</a></div>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 15px; padding: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">

<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">Bless</span>&nbsp;them which persecute you:&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;, and curse not.</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">

<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 15px; padding: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/1-corinthians/4-12.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">1 Corinthians 4:12 KJV</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
And labour , working with our own hands: being reviled , we&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;; being persecuted , we suffer it :</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/1-corinthians/4.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read 1 Corinthians 4</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=1%20Corinthians+4:12" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/1-corinthians/4-12-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=1%20Corinthians+4:12" id="" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Interlinear view</a></div>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 15px; padding: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/1-corinthians/10-16.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">1 Corinthians 10:16 KJV</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
The cup of blessing which we&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;, is it not the communion of the blood of Christ? The bread which we break , is it not the communion of the body of Christ?</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/1-corinthians/10.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read 1 Corinthians 10</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=1%20Corinthians+10:16" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/1-corinthians/10-16-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=1%20Corinthians+10:16" id="" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Interlinear view</a></div>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 15px; padding: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/1-corinthians/14-16.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">1 Corinthians 14:16 KJV</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
Else when thou shalt&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;with the spirit, how shall he that occupieth the room of the unlearned say Amen at thy giving of thanks, seeing he understandeth not what thou sayest ?</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/1-corinthians/14.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read 1 Corinthians 14</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=1%20Corinthians+14:16" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/1-corinthians/14-16-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=1%20Corinthians+14:16" id="" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Interlinear view</a></div>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 15px; padding: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/hebrews/6-14.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Hebrews 6:14 KJV</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
Saying , Surely blessing I will&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;thee, and multiplying I will multiply thee.</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/hebrews/6.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read Hebrews 6</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=Hebrews+6:14" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/hebrews/6-14-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=Hebrews+6:14" id="" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Interlinear view</a></div>
</li>
<li style="list-style: none; margin: 0px 0px 15px; padding: 0px;"><h4 class="ResultTitle" style="clear: left; font-size: 17px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/3-9.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">James 3:9 KJV</a></h4>
<div class="ResultText" style="font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;">
Therewith&nbsp;<span class="Highlight" style="background-color: #ffff96; font-weight: bold; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 2px;">bless</span>&nbsp;we God, even the Father; and therewith curse we men, which are made after the similitude of God.</div>
<div class="QuickLinks" style="color: #cdcdcd; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/kjv/james/3.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Read James 3</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/parallel-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+3:9" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">View in parallel</a>&nbsp;|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/james/3-9-compare.html" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Compare Translations</a>|&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/interlinear-bible/passage.aspx?q=James+3:9" id="" style="color: #336699; text-decoration: none;">Interlinear view</a></div>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
